TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ngta, title = Ngta, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ngta} }

S.FORM: == ngta == ngta ga baq mebazing. bazing ga pinbazing na yaya ngta.sraral bnkis taga zngta qu spngun nha pptuliq. ngta ga blaq balay niqun hi nya.muawx lpyung ga yasa spqaniq ta lpung. nnu'un pgluw sa hi' na ngta tmahuk qu topu' ga, sbing balay ayang nya'.

== ngta == ngta ga baq mebazing. bazing ga pinbazing na yaya ngta.sraral bnkis taga zngta qu spngun nha pptuliq. ngta ga blaq balay niqun hi nya.muawx lpyung ga yasa spqaniq ta lpung. nnu'un pgluw sa hi' na ngta tmahuk qu topu' ga, sbing balay ayang nya'.
S.PHON: == ŋta == ŋta ɣa βaq meβaziŋ. βaziŋ ɣa pinβaziŋ na jaja ŋta.s~ɕraral βnkis~ɕ taɣa zŋta qu s~ɕpŋun nħa pptuliq. ŋta ɣa βlaq βalaj niqun ħi nja.muawx lpjuŋ ɣa jas~ɕa s~ɕpqaniq ta lpuŋ. nnuʔun pɣluw s~ɕa ħiʔ na ŋta tmaħuk qu topuʔ ɣa, s~ɕβiŋ βalaj ajaŋ njaʔ.
